conditionDescriptions: Severe chronic kidney disease with eGFR <30 ml/min per 1.73 m²
contraindications.clinicalRationale: Based on clinical trial eligibility criteria, sitagliptin (TECOS trial) required eGFR ≥30 ml/min per 1.73 m² for kidney eligibility, indicating that use in patients with eGFR <30 ml/min per 1.73 m² requires careful consideration or dose adjustment
contraindications.sourceSnippet: Sitagliptin (TECOS): kidney eligibility eGFR ≥30 ml/min per 1.73 m2; primary outcome MACE; key adverse events: none notable.
